visual_description: A medium close-up shot focuses on a young woman with voluminous, styled blonde hair. She is wearing a dark, possibly black, sweater over a white collared shirt. She holds a sandwich in her left hand and gestures with her right hand as she speaks to a man sitting across from her. The man, seen from the back, has dark, wavy hair and wears a striped sweater. The setting appears to be a busy cafeteria or food court, with other people blurred in the background. The camera angle reverses, now showing the man from the front and the woman from the back.
